steps.title: Set up equations from the given relationships
steps.content:
Translate each statement into an equation:
  • 35% of $h$ = 49% of $j$ gives $0.35h = 0.49j$
  • $j$ = 45% of $k$ gives $j = 0.45k$

steps.title: Express h in terms of j
steps.content:
From $0.35h = 0.49j$, divide both sides by 0.35:
$$h = \frac{0.49j}{0.35}$$
Convert to a simple fraction: $\frac{0.49}{0.35} = \frac{49}{35}$. Since $\gcd(49, 35) = 7$:
$$h = \frac{7 \times 7}{7 \times 5}j = \frac{7}{5}j$$

steps.title: Substitute to find h as a percentage of k
steps.content:
Substitute $j = 0.45k$ into $h = \frac{7}{5}j$:
$$h = \frac{7}{5} \cdot 0.45k = \frac{7}{5} \cdot \frac{45}{100}k = \frac{315}{500}k$$
Simplify by dividing numerator and denominator by 5:
$$h = \frac{63}{100}k$$
This means $h$ is 63% of $k$, so the answer is 63.
